sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27915" key="dolixodrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολῐχο-δρομέω</orth>, <sense id="n27915.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δόλιχος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
